summary: PR #2125 matched and improved many `src/melee/mn/mndiagram` functions, renamed mndiagram symbols to semantic/module-prefixed names, added or adjusted menu/game-mode types and prototypes, and propagated type-name changes through callers. Review focused on non-static function prefixing, moving mndiagram user-data typing into `mn/types.h`, definition placement for linking, and recognizing an inline of `mnDiagram_UpdateScrollArrowVisibility`.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; large addition of mndiagram function bodies, helper names, includes, local structs, and partial/unmatched function work.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: 'match some functions in mndiagram + naming updates'
text_corpus bot report: 14 new matches and 32 improvements in main/melee/mn/mndiagram

key_files.role: Renamed function symbols, especially mndiagram functions and several mn helpers, from address-style or unprefixed names to semantic names.
Propagated recovered gm type names through persistent fighter/name data accessors and call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GetPersistentFighterData return type changed from void* to struct FighterData*
raw_diff: GetPersistentNameData return type changed from struct gmm_x2FF8_inner* to struct NameTagData*

key_files.role: Header prototype updates corresponding to recovered gm accessor signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GetPersistentFighterData prototype changed to struct FighterData*

key_files.role: Game-mode type updates supporting renamed FighterData/NameTagData usage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff references: struct FighterData, struct NameTagData, struct NameTagDataBank

key_files.role: Menu type surface updated, likely in response to review requesting mndiagram user data live in mn/types.h.
evidence_refs: review comment discussion_r2723748223: 'The user data should really be a new type in mn/types.h. Maybe just called Diagram for now.'

key_files.role: Public mndiagram declarations adjusted for renamed/matched functions.
Static declarations or definitions adjusted for mndiagram linking and organization.
evidence_refs: review feedback example: 'When linking, it's easier if these definitions are at the top of the file (or in .static.h).'

key_files.role: Header touched to support mndiagram dependencies/prototypes.
Header touched to support mndiagram dependencies/prototypes.
Caller or naming updates related to renamed menu helpers.
Caller or naming updates related to renamed menu helpers.
Header updates for renamed menu helpers.
Small caller update related to renamed mndiagram/menu functions.
Small header update related to renamed mndiagram/menu functions.
Forward declaration update for menu types.
Caller updated to use recovered NameTagData type from GetPersistentNameData.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct gmm_x2FF8_inner* tmp -> struct NameTagData* tmp

key_files.role: Baselib header touched, likely for process callback typing used by mndiagram.

what_changed.text: Added substantial mndiagram C source, including named helpers such as `mnDiagram_GetFighterByIndex`, `mnDiagram_GetNameByIndex`, `mnDiagram_IsDistanceOverflow`, and `mnDiagram_ConvertDistanceForDisplay`.
Renamed many mndiagram symbols from address-style or unprefixed names to semantic `mnDiagram_*` names in `symbols.txt`.
Recovered and propagated game-mode type names including `FighterData`, `NameTagData`, and `NameTagDataBank` through `gmmain_lib.c`, `gmmain_lib.h`, and at least one caller.
Bot report for the PR recorded 14 new matches and 32 improvements in `main/melee/mn/mndiagram`; the author later acknowledged broken/regressed matches would be fixed.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text issue comment: 'will fix the broken & regressed matches'

smart_moves.text: Renaming public mndiagram functions to module-prefixed semantic names made symbols and headers easier to review and aligned with reviewer guidance.
Typed accessor returns and caller variables replaced generic or placeholder gm struct names, improving type clarity for persistent fighter/name data.
The PR kept unmatched function progress visible rather than claiming all work was complete; both the PR body and bot report distinguish matched functions from 70-90% or partial improvements.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: 'there's still a lot of ugly stuff in the unmatched functions'
text_corpus bot report: '32 improvements in unmatched functions'

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decomp PR exposes non-static functions in a module, reviewers may expect semantic names to retain the module prefix rather than bare helper names.
evidence_refs: review comment discussion_r2723588063: 'All non-static functions should be prefixed with the module name, mnDiagram_.'

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered user data for a menu GObj should be promoted into the owning menu type header when review evidence says the type is shared or should not remain local-only.
evidence_refs: review comment discussion_r2723748223: 'The user data should really be a new type in mn/types.h. Maybe just called Diagram for now.'

decomp_lessons.lesson: For large matching PRs with generated/AI-assisted starts, explicitly separate verified matches from partial improvements and track regressions instead of implying all rewritten functions are finished.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: 'mostly done via claude... cleaned a lot... matched a few myself'
issue comment: 'will fix the broken & regressed matches'

naming_conventions.convention: Use `mnDiagram_` as the prefix for non-static mndiagram functions.

Semantic names were introduced for menu/game-mode helper symbols when evidence in this PR supported the role, e.g. `mn_IsFighterUnlocked`, `mn_GetDigitAt`, `mnDiagram_CountUnlockedFighters`, `mnDiagram_UpdateScrollArrowVisibility`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt mn and mnDiagram renames

naming_conventions.convention: Game-mode persistent data placeholder names were replaced with role names such as `FighterData`, `NameTagData`, and `NameTagDataBank`.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Large mndiagram function body recovery was paired with symbol/header renames so bot reports could attribute new matches and partial improvements to readable semantic names.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: named mndiagram matched functions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A reviewer identified a repeated or extracted code shape as likely an inline of `mnDiagram_UpdateScrollArrowVisibility`, suggesting local helper inlining should be considered when matching mndiagram callbacks.
evidence_refs: review_feedback_examples: 'Looks like an inline of mnDiagram_UpdateScrollArrowVisibility.'

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Definition placement can affect linking/reviewability; a reviewer suggested placing definitions at the top of the file or in `.static.h`.
evidence_refs: review_feedback_examples: 'When linking, it's easier if these definitions are at the top of the file (or in .static.h).'

review_feedback.feedback: Author asked whether all functions should be prefixed with `mn_` because existing names were inconsistent.
All non-static functions should use the module prefix `mnDiagram_`.
Mndiagram user data should be a new type in `mn/types.h`, maybe called `Diagram` for now.
Definitions are easier when placed at the top of the file or in `.static.h`.
A code section looked like an inline of `mnDiagram_UpdateScrollArrowVisibility`.

mndiagram bot report 14 new matches 32 improvements

evidence_refs: metadata_json complete PR identity and changed file list
raw_diff truncated but includes key symbol/type changes
review_comments truncated but includes naming/type review comments
text_corpus truncated but includes bot report and early review records
notes: Changed-file metadata is duplicated in metadata_json and changed_files.jsonl; deduplicated paths were used in this record.
The raw diff and review_comments loaded files are truncated, so details for later hunks and all review comments are incomplete.
The bot report provides match/improvement claims, but this intake did not run or independently verify builds, objdiff, or regression checks.
Some review feedback examples lack commenter identity in the supplied metadata; these were recorded as unknown rather than inferred.
The PR body states AI assistance and partial unmatched work; no unsupported claim is made that all functions in the large mndiagram source are clean or final.

accepted_candidate_records.title: mndiagram non-static functions use mnDiagram_ prefix
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2125 review, `ribbanya` stated: 'All non-static functions should be prefixed with the module name, `mnDiagram_`.' The diff then shows many mndiagram function symbols renamed to `mnDiagram_*` names.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Move recovered mndiagram user data into mn/types.h when it represents module-owned user data
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2125 review advised that mndiagram user data should be a new type in `mn/types.h`, with `Diagram` suggested as a provisional name. The PR also touched `src/melee/mn/types.h`.

source_update_candidates.title: Module-prefixed names for non-static functions
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding or clarifying a naming standard: non-static functions in a module should generally use that module's established prefix, as seen in PR #2125 where review required mndiagram non-static functions to use `mnDiagram_`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GetHitPercentage -> mnDiagram_GetHitPercentage and related symbol renames
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards include conservative naming, but this PR provides concrete review evidence for module-prefix requirements on non-static functions.

source_update_candidates.title: Recovered GObj user data types should live in owning subsystem type headers when shared
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding guidance that recovered user-data structs should be moved from local ad hoc definitions into the owning subsystem type header when review or use sites show they are module-owned/shared; PR #2125 review specifically requested mndiagram user data be a new type in `mn/types.h`.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is consistent with typed-fields-over-pointer-math and truthful-headers, but may be worth a curator-owned source note if repeated across PRs.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram PR touched menu, gm persistent data, symbols, and baselib callback header
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2125's deduplicated changed files span `src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c`, mndiagram headers/static header, `src/melee/mn/types.h`, several `mn` callers, `src/melee/gm/gmmain_lib.*`, `src/melee/gm/types.h`, `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`, and `src/sysdolphin/baselib/gobjproc.h`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for path-scope search and curator indexing; should not be promoted beyond this PR without broader path evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the AI-assisted workflow as an accepted decomp tactic; the PR body says Claude was used but also says manual cleanup was needed and unmatched functions remained ugly/partial.
Do not claim all mndiagram functions in the PR matched; bot evidence only supports 14 new matches plus partial improvements, and the author mentioned broken/regressed matches.
Do not infer exact final contents of `mn/types.h`, `mndiagram.static.h`, or later truncated diff hunks from partial excerpts.
Do not treat semantic symbol names in this PR as globally proven naming for every address-style symbol; they are supported only where shown by the diff/review evidence.
